channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: NBA-leading Cavaliers win 13th straight game, rallying to edge Hornets 118-117
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — Donovan Mitchell scored 24 points and the NBA-leading Cleveland Cavaliers rallied for their 13th straight victory, 118-117 over the Charlotte Hornets on Friday night. Darius Garland added 20 points to help the Cavaliers improve to 53-10.
item.dc:creator: RICHARD WALKER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Knicks star Jalen Brunson expected to miss at least 2 weeks with right ankle sprain
item.description: INGLEWOOD, Calif. (AP) — Jalen Brunson is expected to miss at least two weeks with a right ankle sprain, putting the New York Knicks in a tough spot as they try to maintain their position in the Eastern Conference.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Cal women fall to Notre Dame in ACC tournament, but Big Dance awaits Golden Bears
item.description: The Cal Bears put a scare into the No. 6 ranked Irish in the ACC tournament loss and will be back on the court soon for the NCAA Tournament as a likely No. 8 seed.
item.dc:creator: Mercury News staff and wire reports, The Mercury News

item.title: Shane Lowry likes it tough and builds a 2-shot lead at Bay Hill
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (AP) — Shane Lowry loves the grind of a strong test and it's showing at Bay Hill. He had six birdies Friday in slightly tamer conditions for a 5-under 67, giving him a two-shot lead going into the weekend at the Arnold Palmer Invitational. It wasn't as cold as the day before.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mark Cuban tells Dallas TV station he would have asked for more in return for Doncic
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Former Dallas Mavericks majority owner Mark Cuban said he wouldn't have traded Luka Doncic to the Los Angeles Lakers without receiving much more in return.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Every possible Big Ten Tournament seeding scenario for Michigan basketball
item.description: Michigan basketball only has one game left, but there are still several possible seeding scenarios for the Big Ten Tournament, especially with tiebreakers.
item.dc:creator: Derick Hutchinson, Local 4

item.title: Bill Belichick wasn't UNC's first choice as head football coach: report
item.description: Bill Belichick's reign in North Carolina reportedly wasn't going to happen if Arthur Smith, the Pittsburgh Steelers' offensive coordinator, agreed to join the program.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Washington Commanders release defensive tackle Jonathan Allen
item.description: Six weeks after their playoff run ended with a loss to eventual Super Bowl-champion Philadelphia, the Washington Commanders parted ways with one of their defensive leaders and brought back another.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: IOC’s Bach sees ‘new world order’ ahead of LA Olympics and says Trump will 'fully support' Games
item.description: LAUSANNE, Switzerland (AP) — Thomas Bach says he feels a rare calm in his final weeks as IOC president even as a “new world order" gains speed ahead of the 2028 Los Angeles Olympics.
item.dc:creator: GRAHAM DUNBAR, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: CFB recruiting: The top out-of-state defensive targets for Pac-12 legacy schools
item.description: USC has its eyes on the top linebacker in the country, Xavier Griffin, who committed to the Trojans months ago.
item.dc:creator: Jon Wilner, The Mercury News

item.title: Cadillac F1 receives approval to enter global series as expanded 11th team in 2026
item.description: Cadillac's Formula 1 team received official approval Friday to join the grid in 2026 and its owners insist the team will be ready to compete.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bay FC coaching staff facing investigation after complaints over head coach
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- Days after Bay FC unveiled renderings for its slick new training facility on Treasure Island, the team is facing more troubling allegations regarding its backroom staff.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: Bills agree to sign LB Bernard to 4-year contract extension. AP source says deal worth $50 million
item.description: ORCHARD PARK, N.Y. (AP) — The Buffalo Bills reached an agreement on Friday to sign starting middle linebacker Terrel Bernard to a four-year contract extension worth up to $50 million, with $25.2 million of it guaranteed, in locking up their defensive leader through the 2029 season.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lake Placid awaits word on whether it'll be picked as the Olympic sliding site for 2026 Games
item.description: Picture this: A sliding athlete wins an Olympic medal in Lake Placid next winter, then is chauffeured down to New York for an award ceremony at Rockefeller Center a few days later with thousands of people there to cheer on both moments.
item.dc:creator: Tim Reynolds, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Alex Condon's 'wheeling and dealing' has No. 5 Florida closing in on a No. 1 seed in March Madness
item.description: GAINESVILLE, Fla. (AP) — It wasn’t long ago that Alex Condon was a point guard. Although he was admittedly “pretty uncoordinated” as a teenager playing low-level basketball in Australia, Condon quickly learned how to handle the rock.
item.dc:creator: MARK LONG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Matthew Stafford’s wife reveals she ‘went f---ing mad’ amid Rams’ contract negotiations
item.description: Kelly Stafford said Thursday that she went "mad" during the uncertainty that came with Matthew Stafford's weekslong contract negotiations with the Los Angeles Rams.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Avalanche standout Cale Makar has 6-point game to break franchise record for defenseman
item.description: DENVER (AP) — The ever-modest Cale Makar did all he could to downplay his two-goal, four-assist night. It was a performance that just so happened to be the most productive offensive showing by a defenseman in franchise history.
item.dc:creator: PAT GRAHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Knicks guard Jalen Brunson expected to miss time after suffering ankle injury in OT loss to Lakers
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — New York star guard Jalen Brunson could miss an extended period of time after suffering an ankle injury during overtime in the Knicks' 113-109 loss to the Los Angeles Lakers on Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Outfielder Lawrence Butler agrees to $65.5 million, 7-year deal with A's, AP source says
item.description: A person with direct knowledge of the negotiations says outfielder Lawrence Butler has agreed to a $65.5 million, seven-year contract with the Athletics.
item.dc:creator: Janie Mccauley, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Doncic and James propel Lakers to 113-109 overtime victory over Knicks for 8th straight win
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Luka Doncic scored 32 points, LeBron James added 31 and the Los Angeles Lakers extended their winning streak to eight games by overcoming a double-digit deficit in the fourth quarter and defeating the New York Knicks 113-109 in overtime Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bulls Fest 2025: Team announces dates, registration open for 3v3 tournament
item.description: CHICAGO — Registration is now open for Bulls Fest 2025, which will be held outdoors on the United Center campus from Aug. 23-24, the team announced this week.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Reports: Bears trade for all-pro Chiefs OL Joe Thuney
item.description: LAKE FOREST, Ill. — The Bears have reportedly traded for four-time Super Bowl champion guard Joe Thuney from the Chiefs. According to multiple reports, the Bears are sending back a 2026 fourth-round pick for the 32-year-old guard.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: Flo Rida set to perform postgame concert at Rate Field this summer
item.description: Flo Rida will perform at a postgame concert at Rate Field following the White Sox game versus the San Francisco Giants on Friday, June 27 at 6:40 p.m. CT, with on-field Postgame Concert passes available to single-game ticket purchasers and White Sox season ticket holders.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: 49ers donate $20K in equipment to 3 Santa Clara high schools
item.description: (KRON) -- Students and athletes at three Santa Clara high schools will be stepping up their game after the San Francisco 49ers recently donated more than $20,000 worth of workout and football training equipment.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Mense, KRON4

item.title: Shoeless Joe Jackson's personal scrapbooks hit auction
item.description: There are about 118 pages in the scrapbook that contain various newspaper articles, box scores, summaries of baseball games and photographs of Jackson mounted to the pages.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, NewsNation

item.title: Report: Bears to send 6th-round draft pick to Rams for veteran OL Jonah Jackson
item.description: Offensive line is generally considered the Bears' biggest position of need this offseason. They're reportedly addressing that before free agency even begins by agreeing to trade for a player familiar with new head coach Ben Johnson.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: WNBA champion invests in Bay Area sports franchise
item.description: (KRON) – WNBA champion and Bay Area native Sabrina Ionescu was announced as an investor and commercial advisor for the Bay Football Club. Ionescu, who is also a three-time All-Star and Olympic gold medalist, announced her involvement with Bay FC on Instagram.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Baker, KRON4

item.title: USF football’s 2025 schedule revealed
item.description: TAMPA (USF) - The Bulls learned the course they will chart in the 2025 South Florida Football Season presented by Tampa General Hospital, its third under Head Coach Alex Golesh, on Friday when the American Athletic Conference released the 2025 schedules for member schools.
item.dc:creator: WFLA, NBC

item.title: First female NBA scout talks trailblazing for Women's History Month
item.description: Laflin was previuosly a cheerleader for three professional sports teams, had a recurring role in "Baywatch" and worked as a model.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Foul! Cavaliers guard Ty Jerome blasts officials after whistle-happy crew calls 53 fouls
item.description: Upset with an inordinate number of personals called during Cleveland's 133-129 overtime win against Portland on Sunday, Jerome didn't hold back in criticizing the officiating crew — zeroing in on referee Natalie Sago.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Pitt football player, HSE grad dies in Fishers crash
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS — An 18-year-old football player died in a crash in Fishers late Saturday night. According to a press release sent by the Hamilton County Sheriff's Office Sunday morning, the crash happened around 9:03 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Cooper Hudson, NewsNation

item.title: Florida Panthers acquire D Seth Jones in a trade with the Chicago Blackhawks
item.description: The defending Stanley Cup champion Florida Panthers acquired defenseman Seth Jones in a trade with the Chicago Blackhawks on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: USU gets smacked by Colorado State, 93-66
item.description: FORT COLLINS, Colo. (ABC4 Sports) - This is not the way the Utah State basketball team was hoping to go into the postseason. The Aggies suffered its worst loss of the season, losing by 27 points to Colorado State Saturday afternoon, 93-66.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Going through the NFL combine, Jack Bech inspired by brother killed in New Orleans attack
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — Jack Bech grew up in Lafayette, Louisiana, hoping to emulate his older brother. It didn't matter he was playing football games against Tiger's friends, most of whom were five or six years older, significantly bigger and more polished players than he was.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Florida Man Games return for Round 2 as teams vie to be the world’s worst superhero
item.description: The Florida Man Games are back for Round 2, as teams from around the state gather to prove they have what it takes to join the ranks of the world’s worst superhero.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Ex-NFLer Chris Kluwe says he was fired from job after MAGA protest
item.description: Former NFL punter Chris Kluwe said he was fired from his high school football coaching position after a MAGA plaque protest.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Gavin Lowe scores 35 as Olympus rolls to 5A title
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The first two times Olympus and Highland met this season, both games were decided by a total of four points. But in Friday's 5A championship, it wasn't close at all.
item.dc:creator: ABC 4
